overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban street during golden hour. The scene features palm trees, futuristic skyscrapers in the distance, and a mix of industrial and residential structures along a sidewalk that transitions to a street crossing.

events.description: tattooed pedestrian with blue strap passes close by on the left, temporarily blocking view
pedestrian wearing bright pink hat passes directly in front of camera

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a blue dress along a fenced sidewalk, maintaining steady pace behind them

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue dress walking ahead of camera, being followed
heavily tattooed pedestrian with blue shoulder strap walking in same direction

entered.detail: silver metal barrier with horizontal rails separating sidewalk from industrial area
yellow and red warning sign reading ALL ACTIVITIES ARE RECORDED attached to fence
building facade decorated with american flag pattern and star motifs
raised concrete highway or monorail structure spanning across the background
tall palm trees lining the street against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a fenced urban sidewalk during golden hour, with warm sunlight streaming between buildings. The camera follows a pedestrian in a blue dress past industrial structures decorated with American flag motifs. A tattooed pedestrian passes closely on the left, followed by another wearing a bright pink hat who temporarily obscures the view. Traffic lights and an elevated highway structure are visible in the distance against the setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with run-down residential shacks and accumulated trash

events.description: metal guardrail fence ends, transitioning to open sidewalk with wooden shacks
passing area with accumulated trash bags and debris piled on the right side of walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk through a more residential area with various pedestrians passing by

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden and corrugated metal residential structures with weathered exteriors
accumulation of blue and black garbage bags and scattered debris along the curb
wooden telephone pole with multiple crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The fence ends and the scene opens into a more residential area with run-down wooden shacks on the left. The sidewalk is littered with trash bags and debris on the right side. The camera continues following the pedestrian through moderate foot traffic, with palm trees now closer on the right. The warm sunset backlighting creates long shadows across the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with vehicle traffic and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the asphalt street, transitioning from pedestrian path to road
large black military-style armored truck drives past from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while navigating around vehicles, moving toward the opposite side of the road

notable_agents.action: large black armored military truck driving up the street, passing from right to left

entered.detail: dark asphalt street surface with lane markings and oil stains
large concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
tall modern glass and steel corporate tower visible in the distance against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the asphalt street, transitioning from the sidewalk to the road surface. The camera follows as they cross the street, revealing a large graffiti-covered retaining wall on the left and a futuristic skyscraper silhouetted against the bright sunset ahead. A large military-style truck passes by on the road. The environment opens up significantly, showing more of the dystopian cityscape with scattered pedestrians and moderate vehicle traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a fenced urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, dystopian streetscape under a golden sunset. It begins on a sidewalk where warm sunlight streams between industrial buildings and American flag motifs, following a pedestrian in a blue dress as other passersby momentarily obscure the view. As the fence ends, the scene shifts into a residential area characterized by run-down wooden shacks and trash-strewn walkways, with palm trees appearing closer as long shadows stretch across the concrete. The camera then follows the character as they step off the sidewalk and onto the asphalt, passing a graffiti-covered retaining wall and a large military truck. Finally, the environment expands fully to reveal a futuristic skyscraper silhouetted against the bright horizon amidst the scattered traffic of the city.
